cluster.title: Desktop App (Electron)
cluster.summary: Electron client that supervises an embedded PostgreSQL plus the three Python services from a bundled runtime, mounts the shared chat-surface ChatShell in a locked-down renderer (connect-src 'none'; all HTTP/SSE proxied over allowlisted IPC through main), and owns real end-user auth (Google/SIWE/local-key), folder-grant capabilities, and the tier-2 adapter pipeline. Structurally excellent and heavily tested, but carries large built-but-unwired subsystems (AC8 browser, AC5 broker env delivery) and web-duplicated projection/model-catalog logic.

nodes.summary: Composition root: app lifecycle, single-instance lock, app:// protocol + CSP, brand identity, dev/prod posture resolution, deep links, auto-update, and wiring of transport/auth/capability/connector/tier2 subsystems.

Pure boot state machine + OS composition: keychain boot secrets, port allocation, embedded Postgres lifecycle, migration gates, curated per-service child envs, uvicorn child babysitting with crash-loop detection, health polling, rotating logs.

AuthService: Google system-browser+loopback OIDC, SIWE wallet-page flow, production-safe local-key SIWE, dev-mint (dev posture only), keychain session storage, JSONL auth audit, fail-closed boot session probe.

IPC surface: channel registration with Zod validation both directions, TransportBridge (IPC<->Transport with SSE subscription lifecycle), sandboxed preload allowlist with stateful boot/update channel replay.

AC5 folder grants: native picker (main owns paths), encrypted grant store, authenticated loopback FS broker (/v1/fs/*, /v1/runs/*), two-gate path validation, per-run grant snapshots. Gated by RUNTIME_ENABLE_DESKTOP_FILESYSTEM; token delivery to the AI worker is missing.

AC8 agentic browser: supervised Playwright worker child, hardened loopback broker with replay protection, deny-by-default egress policy + anti-rebinding CONNECT proxy, profile isolation, staging. Built and tested but wired nowhere (no import from main, no worker build task).

Phase-6 tier-2 adapter pipeline: schema validation, AST allowlist scan, vm sandbox, smoke render, on-disk installer, append-only lifecycle audit, retry budget, boundary-error demotion. Install path idles on a stub event source; harvest/download/loader/opt-out modules are consumer-less.
AC9 connector service: reconciled catalog via facade, system-browser OAuth connect with loopback + enterprise:// deep-link race demuxed by 256-bit state; only safe metadata crosses to the renderer.

Renderer shell: mounts shared ChatShell, BootProgress gate, SignInGate (wallet/Google/local), SettingsMount binding every section, controlled cmd-K palette with static command registry, Tier2Bridge into the chat-surface registry.
Desktop-native destination binders (Chats/Activity/Connectors/Skills/Projects/Run): fetch via the IPC-proxied Transport and re-implement the web binders' pure projections (acknowledged duplication).
Shared AssistantComposer bound to desktop substrate ports: file picker, attachment adapter, slash-menu prompts, hardcoded curated model catalog + BYOK/local readiness probes, run dispatch.
Optional C native addon for race-free filesystem ops, loaded best-effort by capabilities/host-fs.ts with a JS fallback when the .node binary is absent.

Build & packaging: three esbuild bundles (main CJS, preload CJS, renderer ESM), electron-builder config with extraResources runtime mapping and GH-release updater feed, eslint boundary bans (no apps/* sibling imports, no renderer fetch/electron).

edges.label: createDesktopSupervisor + boot-mode gating; boot status fan-out to renderer
buildAuthService with posture-resolved mode; wires sign-in/out/refresh into IPC
registerIpcHandlers(bridge, auth, tier2, capability, connectors)
transport.* / auth.* / tier2.* / boot.status / update.status over allowlisted preload bridge
transport.request via IpcTransport; connector.list-catalog / connector.connect
WebTransport /v1/* with main-attached bearer + 401 refresh-retry
run event stream subscriptions proxied to transport.stream-event pushes
/v1/auth/oidc/google/*, /v1/auth/siwe/*, wallet.html, /v1/me/profile session probe
embedded postgres: initdb, pg_ctl -w start, createdb via staged python+psycopg
spawns backend_app.desktop_app uvicorn child with curated env (DB URL, ENTERPRISE_* secrets, SIWE_ORIGIN)
spawns runtime_api.app uvicorn child (in-process worker, postgres or file store selection)
spawns backend_facade.app child (BACKEND_URL, AI_BACKEND_URL, FACADE_WEB_DIST_DIR) and health-gates /v1/health
broker_client.py consumes /v1/fs/* + /v1/runs/* (expects DESKTOP_BROKER_URL/TOKEN — never delivered by supervisor: gap)
DesktopBrowserMcpProvider expects DESKTOP_BROWSER_BROKER_URL/TOKEN (subsystem unwired on desktop side)
host-fs.ts loads the optional workspace_fs native addon (JS fallback when absent)
ChatShell, ports (router/kv/presence), useShellShortcuts, Tier2Loader + registry
ChatsArchive, ActivityDestination, ConnectorsDestination, SkillsDestination, ProjectsDestination, RunDestination
AssistantComposer + composer ports; run dispatch POST /v1/agent/runs via transport
chat-transport CHANNELS + Zod schemas single-sourced for main, preload and renderer
adapter import allowlist JSON from service-contracts via @0x-copilot/api-types
tier2.install/uninstall/mark-broken pushes down; tier2.boundary-error invoke up
reconciled connector catalog + OAuth connect flows brokered through the facade
electron-updater GH Releases feed (packaged+signed only, install-on-quit)
system browser opened at Google authorization endpoint (PKCE, loopback redirect)
viem: per-install local-identity key generation + SIWE message signing
tools/cli launch.mjs sets COPILOT_PRODUCTION=1 consumed by posture.ts (fixes isPackaged=false dev-posture bug)
resolveRuntimePaths consumes the runtime tree staged by tools/desktop-runtime/stage.mjs
electron-builder packaging (extraResources runtime mapping, publish config) + npm workspace scripts
IpcTransport from chat-transport; surface-renderers registerAll; design-system styles
